name: obsidian-tasks
title: Obsidian Tasks
description: Manage your Obsidian Tasks through Raycast
author: yuri_freire

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Add Task
commands.description: Add a new task to Obsidian

commands.name: mark-done
commands.title: Mark Task Done
commands.description: Mark an Obsidian task as done

commands.name: menubar-item
commands.title: Toggle Menubar
commands.description: Show the first task in the menubar

preferences.name: filePath
preferences.title: Tasks File In Your Vault
preferences.description: Path to your tasks file in your vault (used when daily note mode is disabled)

preferences.name: useDailyNote
preferences.title: Use Daily Note
preferences.description: Add tasks to today's daily note instead of a fixed file
preferences.label: Use daily note

preferences.name: dailyNotesFolder
preferences.title: Daily Notes Folder
preferences.description: Path to your daily notes folder in your vault

preferences.name: dailyNotePattern
preferences.title: Daily Note Pattern
preferences.description: Filename pattern for daily notes (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD)

preferences.name: insertAfter
preferences.title: Insert After
preferences.description: Insert tasks after this text/pattern. Leave empty to append to file

preferences.name: appendToList
preferences.title: Append to List
preferences.description: Find list after pattern and append to it
preferences.label: Append to list

preferences.name: showDueDate
preferences.title: Show Due Date in Menubar
preferences.description: Display the due date of tasks in the menubar
preferences.label: Show due date

preferences.name: menubarTaskCount
preferences.title: Show Task Count in Menubar
preferences.description: Show the number of tasks in the menubar
preferences.label: Show task count

preferences.name: showIcon
preferences.title: Show Icon in Menubar
preferences.description: Show the icon of tasks in the menubar
preferences.label: Show icon

preferences.name: showOnlyCurrent
preferences.title: Show Only Current Tasks
preferences.description: Show only tasks with a due or scheduled date that is today or earlier
preferences.label: Show only current tasks

preferences.name: maxMenubarDescriptionLength
preferences.title: Max Description Length
preferences.description: Maximum length of task description to show in menubar
